title: Weighers, Measurers, Checkers, and Samplers, Recordkeeping
description: Weigh, measure, and check materials, supplies, and equipment for the purpose of keeping relevant records. Duties are primarily clerical by nature. Includes workers who collect and keep record of samples of products or materials.

tasks.text: Document quantity, quality, type, weight, test result data, and value of materials or products to maintain shipping, receiving, and production records and files.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Weigh or measure materials, equipment, or products to maintain relevant records, using volume meters, scales, rules, or calipers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Collect or prepare measurement, weight, or identification labels and attach them to products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine products or materials, parts, subassemblies, and packaging for damage, defects, or shortages, using specification sheets, gauges, and standards charts.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Signal or instruct other workers to weigh, move, or check products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collect product samples and prepare them for laboratory analysis or testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain, monitor, and clean work areas, such as recycling collection sites, drop boxes, counters and windows, and areas around scale houses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Compare product labels, tags, or tickets, shipping manifests, purchase orders, and bills of lading to verify accuracy of shipment contents, quality specifications, or weights.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove from stock products or loads not meeting quality standards, and notify supervisors or appropriate departments of discrepancies or shortages.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect products and examination records to determine the number of defects per worker and the reasons for examiners' rejections.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Store samples of finished products in labeled cartons and record their location.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Count or estimate quantities of materials, parts, or products received or shipped.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Communicate with customers and vendors to exchange information regarding products, materials, and services.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill orders for products and samples, following order tickets, and forward or mail items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate scalehouse computers to obtain weight information about incoming shipments such as those from waste haulers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort products or materials into predetermined sequences or groupings for display, packing, shipping, or storage.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Transport materials, products, or samples to processing, shipping, or storage areas, manually or using conveyors, pumps, or hand trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
